title: The Return of Chandu
writer: Harry A. Earnshaw, Vera M. Oldham, R.R. Morgan
actors: Bela Lugosi, Maria Alba, Clara Kimball Young
plot: The cult of Ubasti, headquartered on the isle of Lemuria, believes that Princess Nadji of Egypt is a reincarnation of their long-dead goddess, Ossana, and intend to sacrifice her so that Ossana may be resurrected.
